## ℹ️ Repository Notice

**This is a maintained fork** of [FoliniC/azure_openai_sdk_conversation](https://github.com/FoliniC/azure_openai_sdk_conversation) with Microsoft Foundry integration support.

Users migrating from the original repo should follow the [Migration Guide in README.md](../README.md#migration-from-folinic-repository).
